Ntc Of Mtn For Order To Compel Responses Of Deft'S To Plntf'S Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories Set One, Req. For Production Of Documents And For Order Deeming Matters Admitted By Deft And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-21-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE STATED BY EITHER PARTY. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Edward Newman's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents and for an order to deem certain matters admitted as to defendant Morro is granted. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 10 days of notice of this order. The matters set forth in the requests for admissions are ordered admitted. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $240 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.

Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents as to defendant Tribecca Properties LLC is granted. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 10 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $200 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
